pages: Garu-chan visits a small café in the port town, where she hears about the lost memories case from the owner, an elderly woman who suddenly can't recall what she did on certain days.
Garu-chan, with her child on her back, walks around the port town to investigate the cause of the lost memories, asking various questions to the townspeople to gather clues.
Garu-chan realizes that the lost memories case might be connected to her own secrets. She tries to recall her past while carrying her child, but her memories are vague.
To find the cause of the lost memories, Garu-chan visits a nursing home in the port town, where she discovers an important clue to the case.

Garu-chan uses her proactive and responsible nature to get to the bottom of the lost memories case, revealing that the experience taught her the importance of family bonds and love. The next episode will feature Garu-chan taking on a new case.
